Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment across all process variants containing Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Total time spent in Queued + Awaiting Assignment in cases that eventually include Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment when followed directly by Accepted + In Progress in variants ending with Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Completed + In Call in variants where both activities occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Elapsed time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the subsequent Completed + In Call, grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in cases that transition through Accepted + Wait - User before reaching Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Accepted + Wait - User occurs

Name: Cycle Time of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that contain at least one occurrence of Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Average time it takes Queued + Awaiting Assignment to be followed by Accepted + In Progress in paths leading to Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Total time between the first and last occurrence of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in multi-occurrence variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Minimum time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Completed + Resolved in variants where Completed + In Call appears prior to resolution
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Time until Queued + Awaiting Assignment is performed after case initiation in variants that later include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Average waiting time to Queued + Awaiting Assignment in cases where Completed + In Call occurs without intermediate wait states
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Elapsed time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Completed + Closed in variants that pass through Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Time of Queued + Awaiting Assignment when directly followed by another Queued + Awaiting Assignment before reaching Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Average time from the start of the case to Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants ending with Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs
